description: Arima font family designed by Natanael Gama, Joana Correia, Rosalie Wagner

script: $fontFiles = @("Arima[wght].ttf") foreach ($file in $fontFiles) {     $fontName = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($file)     Remove-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Fonts' -Name "$fontName (TrueType)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue     Remove-Item "$env:windir\Fonts\$file" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
